name: QA 1297
description:

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1297.out.bad)
5a6,7
> Job for pmie.service failed because the service did not take the steps required by its unit configuration.
> See "systemctl status pmie.service" and "journalctl -xe" for details.
7d8
<      pmie: primary engine: PCP_LOG_DIR/pmie/HOSTNAME/pmie.log
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az86 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az86 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az86 -f simple.numfetch
